General.Name: Da Sen Holdings Group Ltd
General.Description: Da Sen Holdings Group Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and sells plywood products in the People's Republic of China. The company operates through Manufacturing and selling of plywood and related services; Leasing activities; and Trading of agricultural products segments. The company also engages in manufacturing of interior decorative materials and furniture; leasing business; and technology development. Da Sen Holdings Group Limited was founded in 2015 and is headquartered in Heze, the People's Republic of China.
